name: @zcaceres/skill-security-gitleaks
description: Set up gitleaks secret-scanning on a repo: scan history for existing leaks first (stops if dirty), then scaffold .gitleaks.toml, a local pre-commit hook, and a pinned CI workflow that scans both git history and working tree. Use when the user says 'add gitleaks', 'set up secret scanning', 'gitleaks boilerplate', or '/security-gitleaks'.
